reviews.review_description:
instructor blurts 

"grab the magazine on the table load the gun grab the magazine on the table load the gun grab the magazine on the table load the gun grab the magazine on the table load the gun grab the magazine on the table load the gun grab the magazine on the table load the gun"

He annoyingly does this without stopping and wont stop talking.. 

.... you literally can't load the gun. if you can't load the gun you can't start the game so 🙄
Please make a exact game but with mission and human enemies free pls
Its a realy good game but maby add som real target like a robber not cardboard and ad multiplayer but its fun thx

3.2 stars and 135 reviews Is suprising for a game with mechanics like this and the detail aswell 

Yes it's very limited and needs more e.g multiplayer, the upstairs cat walk, possibly different map layouts, smooth turn and definitely more customization to the guns but the detail currently is great it looks beutiful doesn't lag at all the mechanics of doors and using the gun feels great it's not too complicated 

With more updates to this game with more features this could rival the extremely buggy split second 

Also a more in depth tutorial would be good as I was stuck trynna find the "interaction button" for a food 10 mins idk if that's just me but I was spamming every button and nothing was working but got it to work and had fun

Nothing works. 
Cannot even load mags in the  beginning of the game delete delete  if I gonna put a game on the quest platform at least get it to somewhat work.

It seems like a really cool thing but I can’t figure out how to release hostages I was stuck on it for a while still never figured it out if someone could help me that would be lovely but overall what I played was fun
I enjoyed the game but I wish there was a multiplayer mod so I could play with my friends
It is trash want is the interacton button I click every button it did not work ... Trash
The tutorial doesnt work, the hostage "interaction button" doesnt work

reviews.review_title: Loved the game settings don’t work
reviews.review_description: Hi I loved to play this game very fun but please fix settings they don’t work and I hate that there is no smooth turning it’s extremely hard for me to move around please fix gameplay was great thanks for such an awsome freebie
it keeps repeating press the interaction button but the button doesn't even exist the button doesn't even exist

reviews.review_title: Love the game but its missing smt
reviews.review_description:
The rifle is too big for the smaller areas, for an example: the bathroom stalls, sidearm is neccasery iff you ask me. Another map would be nice too, like a house or a warehouse that is not all wood. Maybe npcs that will try to shoot you, and are not just a wooden plank. Having a ability to give the npcs a chance to turn themselves in with a click on your controller would be nice too, with handcuffs or zipties ofcourse. Multiplayer so you can roleplay a swat house raid or something like that. 
I really hope that some of these things will be added to the game soon!

reviews.review_title: Best CQB app in all of VR
reviews.review_description: Great app that covers cqb amazingly with hostages and pop out terrorists. Replicates a cqb range great!
i can’t even press the start button

reviews.review_title: Great game for a free practice range
reviews.review_description: Great game, although I would have to agree with the other people saying it needs a sidearm. Other than that, I use this a lot to refresh on my room clearing skills

reviews.review_title: not good for short or disabled people
reviews.review_description: good game but seated mode does not work so i am forced crouched. i have a lifting mechanism on my wheelchair which brings you up to standing height but the knees are still bent. the gun is also huge
the game was unplayable my character kept on moving backwards and there is no interaction button please fix this game
And reloading is where you have to bring your hand all the way up just to pull the thing.

The beginning of the game didn’t make any sense and it was the worst experience I’ve ever had

Telling me to do something I can’t even do. I’m talking to a cardboard box. 
￼
PUT IN PISTOLS NOT JUST ARS PLZ
The arena is awesome. The rifle is awesome, but there needs to be more customizable and needs more weapons. Like a side arm or a shotgun. And possibly multiplayer.

the games fun. the first time. but the reloading isn't great. u have to click the trigger to reload. infinite magazines so u can spray and pray and not make shots count cause u have only so many. maps boring after 4 runs. gun handling is hard to work with in small spaces so a side arm would be great for tight areas. more guns are needed. not just a rifle. other than that I love the concept and I think this is Dimond in the dirt.

reviews.review_title: decent but something needs a fix
reviews.review_description: the game itself is nice but the handling of the rifle could use a bit of work, aiming is quite hard to do as it just feels a lot restricted sometimes it would just move to the side and jitter but nonetheless good game imo
I can't get the hostage thing to work and I can't pass it otherwise save your money overall all it's okay besides the hostage mechanism

reviews.review_title: The game won’t even download successfull
reviews.review_description: I can’t even try the game because it won’t even download properly, I have plenty of space on my headset for the game and yet it says I don’t have enough space when I in fact do. This game looks plenty fun but I’ll never know because I can’t try it.
What’s of time and money. Games sucks big a s s
The mechanics are very janky
Nothing special, mainly just an odd vibe

reviews.review_title: Just got the game don’t know what to do
reviews.review_description: Good game in all but how do you get to different maps and also if there isn’t can you add multiplayer and a campaign and a campaign multiplayer
Game is fun
This game I just wow realistic guns but the turn is kinda wonky but still awesome sauce
This app is horrible to play. Can't load a gun. Tracking with controllers suck.
I played one time prior and the second time I was unable to release the hostage during the tutorial.

I feel like the movement is kinda unrealistic and the walking is to fast. When I look at my feet when I’m running or walking it looks like I’m a very flexible robot please fix the movement all tho this game is not bad.
Krep ur money this is crap

I cant rate it yet becuse I havent played it yet but I have an Idea, you do the training and then you can do levels where you're actully in a building saving people.  Huh pretty good right I would most definitely enjoy if it would be added. Just released I have to rate it so I did

This app has alot of potential.The concept is good but at present I can't use this app.I find the repetitive dialogue irritating,the movement and game play very basic,buttons unclear.I hope this improves as this app can be very good.

I really hope this is a work in progress as it shows promise. But it needs some attention to make it playable. For one, anable a switch to smooth turn. Yes if you are standing you can just turn but snapping left and right is very jarring. The menu doesn't work at all. I select things and nothing. A better training startup is needed. To save the hostage you need to put your sight onto them and press A.....this took a whole to work out. More weapons. All there is is an automatic rifle which you can not change to semi so emptying mags is fast. Changing mags could be better, using trigger once lined up is odd. Just insert like other games. Overall not bad but needs work
The game is good but fix lags like i tried to go through a door but glitched out the map but please add pistols or shotgun and locked doors and shoot them off
For this wondering what the interaction button is, point your gun at the innocent, and press either X or A.
Not bad but if multiplayer is added it will be good or missions

reviews.review_title: I know what to do now...
reviews.review_description: This game is a pleasure to play. Don't take my word for it. Give it a go and make sure you read the tips from other players. I agree that a hand gun would be a cool addition to the game if that were possible or worth the developers effort.

I've only started with VR and with this game. It took me a long time to figure out how to release the hostage (you have to have the sight on the hostage, then press the A button with your right hand) this was super frustrating to have to figure out. Some better instruction would make this awesome. I'm still trying to figure out how to grab the extra mags that are supposed to be on your vest...but I'm sure I will eventually figure it out.
I believe the action button is pushing in the right joystick

This game was so realistic and fun the gun feels so smooth when your shooting and you have to think about your tactics and reload before almost every turn so you need to be tactical there’s just 1 thing that i think would make it even better add more levels and a pistol or a shotgun and some and maybe add locked doors that you have to shoot the lock to open it (plus i think you should release a full game with a story ) 5\5 stars

Je n'ai pas réussi à repérer comment débuter le jeu, les instructions ne sont pas très explicites. Ce serait bénéfique d'ajouter du texte pendant le tutoriel pour clarifier les instructions prononcées par le personnage. Sinon, le jeu semble visuellement attrayant.

I actually found this really fun! The only reason it isn’t 5 stars is really because there is room for improvement. 

I personally found the loading and unloading of the gun a bit frustrating for a fast paced CQB trainer and honestly if that was different it would make so much difference! 

I didn’t really feel the need to have legs shown in this but i get you are trying to show off what you can do. Would love to see maybe a pistol added to this to go with the AR firearm. 

Really good and enjoyed it! 

If you can beat my time let me know!!

Also video posted below 🤜🏼

Victoria VR | CQB Arena | Speed Run!
https://youtu.be/TY522CluBUg

reviews.review_title: Terrible design. Can't get past tutorial
reviews.review_description:
"Press the interaction button on the hand in which you're holding the rifle." Ok. I pressed all buttons on both controllers. Nothing happened. Then I thought, "Maybe it's actually a virtual button on the virtual hands themselves." Nope. No button anywhere. 

I can't start the game because I can't even get past the tutorial, which apparently can't be skipped. 

WTH is the interaction button? How in the world can I actually start playing this?
I got sick in the fist 5 min and the instructions are not clear at all

I have fun with this game it is very fun and if you are wondering what the “interaction button” is to release hostages it is pressing X and A buttons at the same time together i saw a couple people struggling to figure this out.
This game has a lot potential, just keep updating and it will be the best cqb vr game out there!
Great game. Good weapon handling and ability to hold weapon on multiple points.
i love it. Thanks for that free game VictoriaVR!
I get glitches with the gun when I try to reload the gun disappears in my hand but so far very good game
This game is so good the guns feel like boneworks quality for free I don’t know why you wouldn’t have this also plz add pistols

reviews.review_title: Good game but please add pistols
reviews.review_description: This game is so good. Feels really good and the gun physics are like bonelab/boneworks. You have to be strategic with every turn (if you play this game properly) like in irl cqb training but I would really like to see an update where you guys would add more guns or at least a pistol. This update would bring my rating to 5 stars. The pistol could go on your right side of your hip where a holster is so you could store it, this in my opinion would make the game a lot more fun and I think a bit more replayable since after a bit you wish you had more guns to practice with. Adding this update would make this game so much better. Also locked doors would be a great addition where you would have to shoot the lock to open it. This game is so close to being perfect but I think it just needs a little update also if we could have multiplayer where you could load into a lobby with one of your friends and go through it together I think that would be so good. Hopefully you guys read this and consider making these changes I think it would improve this game a lot
WHERE AND WHAT IS THE "INTERACTION BUTTON" (overall good game tho but STILL)
good game looks a bit poorly made and sketchy but very good game im very proud of the devepleper
I love this screen, but the only thing that was wrong with it it’s just there’s only one gun. I want an update to be my has multiple guns.
A wonderfull project of metaverse
